# NeuroAdaptive Leadership

> NeuroAdaptive Leadership is a book and leadership development framework by Jason Jones, Ph.D. that applies neuroscience to help leaders think clearly, regulate emotion, and act with intention under pressure. Releasing August 25, 2026.

## About the Book

NeuroAdaptive Leadership introduces a brain-based approach to leading with greater clarity, confidence, and adaptability in an era of disruption, pressure, and rapid change. Dr. Jason Jones explains why many traditional leadership models fall short when leaders face uncertainty, emotional strain, complex decisions, and shifting workplace demands. The book shows how leaders can upgrade their internal operating system by improving the way they think, regulate emotion, and act with intention.

Drawing from neuroscience, psychology, and practical leadership experience, NeuroAdaptive Leadership offers a clear framework for helping leaders become less reactive, more adaptive, and better equipped to build resilient, high-trust, high-performance cultures.

**Release date:** August 25, 2026
**Formats:** Hardcover, Paperback, Audiobook, eBook
**Website:** https://neuroadaptiveleadership.com/

## The A.D.A.P.T. Model

The book is built around five core practices:

- **A — Attune to Disruption:** Recognize and respond to change signals before they escalate. Develop awareness of environmental and internal disruption patterns.
- **D — Decode Thought Patterns:** Identify cognitive distortions and limiting mental models. Upgrade the thinking habits that drive reactive behavior.
- **A — Align Identity and Intention:** Close the gap between who you are and how you lead. Build congruence between values, beliefs, and daily actions.
- **P — Program Adaptivity:** Build neuroplasticity-backed habits for sustained high performance. Wire new neural pathways through deliberate practice.
- **T — Transfer through Culture:** Spread adaptive leadership across teams and organizations. Make adaptability a cultural default, not a personal trait.

## What Leaders Learn

1. Wire for clarity — quiet the noise of disruption and make decisions that hold up
2. Lead with confidence — replace reactive patterns with grounded, evidence-based moves
3. Move with speed — cut decision cycle time using the brain's threat-and-reward systems
4. Build human-centered culture — tools to build teams where every brain can do its best work
5. Adapt in real time — sense, reframe, and recover so change works for you, not against you
6. Sustain the upgrade — install daily, weekly, and team rituals that keep the upgrade online

## About the Author

**Jason Jones, Ph.D.**
Organizational Psychologist | Executive Coach | International Keynote Speaker
Website: https://drjasonjones.com

Jason Jones, Ph.D. has spent more than 25 years helping leaders perform under pressure. He blends rigorous brain science with the practical realities of leading real teams in real organizations. He holds a Ph.D. in Organizational Psychology and has advised Fortune 500 companies as an executive coach and keynote speaker.

## Endorsements

- **Mark Sanborn**, Author of *You Don't Need a Title to Be a Leader*, President of Sanborn & Associates, Inc.: "Jason Jones has written a practical and powerful guide for leaders who want to think better so they can lead better."
- **Dr. Tony Bridwell**, Chief Talent Officer, The Encompass Group: "He offers a powerful, brain-based blueprint for thriving amid perpetual uncertainty."
- **Bruce McIntyre**, CEO, Oklahoma Parkinson Foundation: "NeuroAdaptive Leadership is the right book at the right time. Smart, yet instantly portable."

## Free Resources

Available at https://neuroadaptiveleadership.com/resources.html (email opt-in required):

- **NeuroAdaptive Leadership Workbook** — 48-page PDF with self-paced exercises and reflection prompts
- **NAL Team Discussion Guide** — 24-page PDF with six structured team conversations
- **Pressure to Performance Scripts** — 16 word-for-word scripts for difficult leadership moments

## Assessment & Tools

- **NeuroAdaptive Leadership Index (NLI):** Research-backed self-assessment scoring leadership readiness across six dimensions. https://neuroadaptiveleadership.com/nli.html
- **MissionBuilder:** Guided 7-step tool to craft a NeuroAdaptive mission statement for leaders and teams. https://neuroadaptiveleadership.com/missionbuilder.html
